tasks.label: Run Java DSA (fallback)
args:
# Compile all Java files in functions_arrays. If the active file is not a Java file, run this fallback class
javac functions_arrays/*.java && 
if [ -n "${fileBasenameNoExtension}" ] && [ "${fileExt}" = ".java" ]; then 
  java -cp "${workspaceFolder}" functions_arrays.${fileBasenameNoExtension} < functions_arrays/input.txt > functions_arrays/output.txt; 
else 
  java -cp "${workspaceFolder}" functions_arrays.anyBaseSubtraction < functions_arrays/input.txt > functions_arrays/output.txt; 
fi
